violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back hall, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
The cold drawers under the grill was observed in poor repair, with an ambient temperature of 51 degrees. PIC scheduled service for 6/5/25. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
